case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DEANA MATTHEWS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-07-2014
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA $5,518.10 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,811.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-01-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, DEANA
